Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Every time I get geared up, my brain gets into this mindset, like... "Time to get 'er done!" Y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm just happy I get to match with my sister.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}She got all pouty the moment we changed clothes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Who would've thought she just wanted an armband?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}...This doesn't make you one of us, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Still, it's a good thing you've got one on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}This way, I can get a detailed read on your vitals.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I had some extras prepared, but I didn't expect we would need them again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Well, is everyone ready to start exploring? Are we missing anything?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I don't think so, but... I've got a bad feeling about this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Junpei here might not, but what about the rest of you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Yeah, I can't put my finger on it, but something does feel off...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Agreed. Something's not sitting quite right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Wait, hold up, I definitely feel something... I think? Maybe?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Yamagishi, have there been any changes to our readings?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Um... Well, I don't know how to put this, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}They're indicating that everyone's strength has weakened significantly, which may prove to be an impediment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Uh, ain't that, like, really bad for us!? Is it 'cause of that Abyss of Time thing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I don't seem to be affected. Are you sure it's not simply because you're all weak?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}So if it's not because of the Abyss... Does it have something to do with us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}We did take a step back from fighting for a while, so that's probably the biggest factor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}More importantly, your Personas' output is currently unstable, so their abilities are partially limited right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Maybe we just forgot how to fight? Does muscle memory even go away...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Not that it really matters. All we can do right now is work with what we've got.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Easy for you to say, but... Aigis, you're nervous too, aren'tcha?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Right? I don't know, this seems like it'll be pretty rough...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Man... Even Ai-chan's on Yuka-tan's side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}You have nothing to worry about, Sister. I'll be there for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Well, now that we've established the situation at hand...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I'd like to set expectations a bit before we head out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I should operate on my own to find out whether or not there's more to those materials we found underground.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I guess you are the only one who can identify that sort of thing, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I'll regroup with everyone once I learn more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}There's something else I want to look into as well, so it's more efficient for the team to progress without me there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Your objective is to see if the Abyss of Time connects to anywhere else besides the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}And since we don't know how much time this will take, it's imperative that we secure our supply routes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Oh, in that case, kinda seems like a job for Koromaru, don't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I mean, he's sharper than a human! Y'know, with his sense of smell and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Yeah? You're game, bud? I'm a little worried about us being weaker than usual, though... So how 'bout I come with ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}All right, I'll let the two of you handle that, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Iori, Koromaru, and I will go about our own tasks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 0 1 27}Everyone else, follow Aigis's command and focus on exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_037_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hope to reunite with you all soon.

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}That's what I like to hear—and you can count on me to bring back results, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}And I as well. Give it the best you've got, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Let's head out once you've decided on our course of action.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}If we want to make progress, then we better get to it.[n]{f 1 1}
